title: 154 PCS Kids Tool Set Toys, with Electric Drill and Tool Box, Toddler Screw Toy, Pretend Play Toys, Kids Educational Construction Toys for Boys Girls Ages 2 3 4 5 6 Years Old
features: 1. Comprehensive Tool Kit Set: The LEZKIDOL Kids Tool Set contains 154 pieces, including a low-speed electric drill, screwdrivers, nuts, wrenches, pliers, gears, artificial boards, rotary handles, bolts, and assorted components. This comprehensive kit is designed to foster hands-on learning

2. Creative Construction Play: Children can assemble over 10 different models such as windmills, giraffes, robots, tanks, and dogs using this educational tool set. These construction activities stimulate imaginative play while enhancing practical engineering skills and problem-solving abilities
3. Portable Storage Solution: Included with the set is a robust, thoughtfully designed toolbox that encourages organisational habits through easy clean-up and storage

4. Premium Safety Standards: Crafted from thick, non-toxic ABS plastic with rounded edges, all components meet rigorous safety certifications. The high-quality material ensures exceptional durability and wear resistance for long-term use

5. Educational Developmental Toy:This STEM-focused playset promotes Kid role-playing scenarios and DIY projects that develop fine motor skills and creative thinking. An exceptional choice for preschool learning, it serves as an ideal birthday, Christmas, or surprise gift for children aged 2+
description: Product Description 154PCS - Kids Play Tool Set Toys This versatile Kids tool set includes a cordless screwdriver, wrench, pliers, a twist grip, a screwdriver, nuts, bolts, gears, puzzle pieces, and all other accessories and spare parts. Promotes fine motor skills, problem-solving, and creativity through Montessori principles. Let your children immerse themselves in the world of architecture and create their own creations.
